name: nlqdb
description: Natural-language databases. Ship data-driven features with an English goal, not a query.

scripts.check:go: gofumpt -l cli && go -C cli vet ./... && cd cli && golangci-lint run ./...
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run check:go && bun run check:py
scripts.changeset:publish: echo 'npm publish gated until packages emit dist/ — see .changeset/README.md' && exit 0
